raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I have purchased a XXXX from a Merchant called XXXX XXXX with a total cost of {$3800.00}. On XX/XX/XXXX, I requested the merchant to return the merchandise as I was not happy with it. The merchant issued me a XXXX XXXX to do it. 

I returned the merchandise using the label provided by the customer as requested. The tracking at the time showed that the merchandise was successfully delivered to the merchant. Merchant claimed it did not receive it, despite me following their instructions to the T. As the merchant claimed they had not received it, I opened a dispute with Amex and provided supporting documentation for it showing I did all the steps I was required. Amex representative at the time did not listen to my reasoning and ruled in favor of the merchant. Tracking is not available any longer but Amex should be able to see all documentation i've uploaded related to the case through the multiple conversations we had. I would like CFPB to support me to reopen this case with Amex and I'm loooking to have this dispute being ruled in my favor and being credited {$3800.00}. 

Dispute Number : Ref. XXXX
